title: anthemis cretica subsp. pyrethriformis
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. pyrethriformis, commonly known as Pyrethrum or Pyrethrum daisy, is a subspecies of Anthemis cretica, a flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its pyrethrin content, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. pyrethriformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antiseptic, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues.
